strengths: Demonstrated good traction setup technique with Maryland grasper
Maintained steady cutting progression around most of the circle
Showed consistent instrument coordination during the cutting phase
weaknesses: Failed to complete the circle within the time limit
Cutting speed was insufficient for the intermediate level
May have spent too much time on initial setup or repositioning

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, focusing on completing each quarter within 30 seconds.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the circle within the time limit

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and cutting efficiency.
drills.targets_weakness: Cutting speed was insufficient for the intermediate level

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid technique into faster execution. Your setup and coordination are good, but completion speed needs improvement to meet the benchmark.
